textByHashes.96506aef595a842fa58b05b615b0030d58983d00: The doll? You mean to destroy Iban? No! I am the son of Zamorak! I can't die! And you... You are his slave now! Even if you kill me you will hear his calls forever! You have already fallen!
textByHashes.45e84ae6518f0ff12d173be1c4a6b0705a999d4f: I am the great Iban, I cannot die!
textByHashes.ac5e07f044390beeb5d83deb3fe94dcf4d08dce0: You belong in the slave pits!
